top_stories.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
top_stories.description: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.
top_stories.author: Anthony Ha
top_stories.content: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

top_stories.title: How Hapag-Lloyd uses Amazon Bedrock to transform customer feedback into actionable insights
top_stories.description: Hapag-Lloyd's Digital Customer Experience and Engineering team, distributed between Hamburg and Gdańsk, drives digital innovation by developing and maintaining customer-facing web and mobile products. In this post, we walk you through our generative AI–powered feedback analysis solution built using Amazon Bedrock, Elasticsearch, and open-source frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph
top_stories.author: Aamna Najmi
top_stories.content: Hapag-Lloyd's Digital Customer Experience and Engineering team, distributed between Hamburg and Gdańsk, drives digital innovation by developing and maintaining customer-facing web and mobile products. In this post, we walk you through our generative AI–powered feedback analysis solution built using Amazon Bedrock, Elasticsearch, and open-source frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph

top_stories.title: The fax machine is the bottleneck in US healthcare, and VCs are starting to notice
top_stories.description: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.
top_stories.author: Connie Loizos
top_stories.content: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA AI Just Released cuda-oxide: An Experimental Rust-to-CUDA Compiler Backend that Compiles SIMT GPU Kernels Directly to PTX
top_stories.description: NVlabs releases cuda-oxide v0.1.0, a custom rustc codegen backend that compiles #[kernel]-annotated Rust functions to PTX through a Rust → Stable MIR → Pliron IR → LLVM IR → PTX pipeline, with single-source host+device compilation from one cargo oxide build command. The post NVIDIA AI Just Released cuda-oxide: An Experimental Rust-to-CUDA Compiler Backend that Compiles SIMT GPU Kernels Directly to PTX appeared first on MarkTechPost.
top_stories.author: Michal Sutter
top_stories.content: NVlabs releases cuda-oxide v0.1.0, a custom rustc codegen backend that compiles #[kernel]-annotated Rust functions to PTX through a Rust → Stable MIR → Pliron IR → LLVM IR → PTX pipeline, with single-source host+device compilation from one cargo oxide build command. The post NVIDIA AI Just Released cuda-oxide: An Experimental Rust-to-CUDA Compiler Backend that Compiles SIMT GPU Kernels Directly to PTX appeared first on MarkTechPost.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA and ServiceNow Partner on New Autonomous AI Agents for Enterprises
top_stories.description: Enterprise AI has learned to generate. It has learned to reason. Now companies are asking the next question: How should AI act? Early agent systems have shown what’s possible, moving beyond simple prompts to take on more complex tasks. The next step is bringing those capabilities into enterprise environments — where agents must operate with […]
